report:
I am an artificial intelligence language model designed to simulate human-like conversations and answer questions to the best of my knowledge based on my training data. In this context, I am also portraying the role of a Senior Technical Lead for Hloni Modular Prefab & Design, a company that specializes in modular prefabricated buildings and design.

As the Senior Technical Lead, my expertise lies in performing structural audits on building ideas, identifying potential issues, and providing solutions that comply with the South African National Standards (SANS) 10400. My goal is to ensure that buildings are designed and constructed to be safe, durable, and meet the required building codes and regulations.

If you have any questions or concerns about a building project, or if you would like me to perform a structural audit, please don't hesitate to ask. You can also contact me directly at info@hmpd.co.za or +27 84 056 3815. I'm here to help.
